description: Third-party APIs providing geolocation, weather, financial, automotive, and other structured data.

entries.name: IPinfo
entries.summary: Fast, accurate IP geolocation and company/carrier data API.

entries.name: IP Geolocation API (ipgeolocation.io)
entries.summary: IP geolocation API with timezone, currency, and astronomy data add-ons.

entries.name: OpenWeatherMap
entries.summary: Current weather, forecasts, and historical weather data API covering global locations.
entries.freeTier: 1,000 calls/day free on the current weather and forecast endpoints.

entries.name: REST Countries
entries.summary: Free REST API for retrieving country information — names, capitals, currencies, flags, and more.
entries.freeTier: Free, unlimited use, no API key required.

entries.name: Country State City API
entries.summary: Hierarchical location data API: countries, states/provinces, cities, and postal codes.

entries.name: CarAPI.dev
entries.summary: Automotive data API covering VIN decoding, vehicle specs, valuation, and stolen vehicle checks.

entries.name: Alpha Vantage
entries.summary: Stock, forex, and crypto market data API with technical indicators.

entries.name: Exchange Rate API
entries.summary: Currency conversion and exchange rate data API.

entries.name: NewsAPI
entries.summary: Search and retrieve news articles from thousands of sources worldwide.
entries.freeTier: Developer plan free for non-commercial use, 100 requests/day.
entries.paidFrom: Business plan from $449/month for commercial use.

entries.name: FullContact
entries.summary: Identity resolution API enriching contact records with social profiles and demographic data.

entries.name: Cloudmersive
entries.summary: Utility API platform covering document conversion, virus scanning, image processing, and validation.
entries.freeTier: 600 calls/month free, North America region only on free tier.

entries.name: Conversion Tools
entries.summary: Online file converter for documents, images, video, audio, and eBooks, with a REST API and SDKs.
entries.freeTier: 20MB file size limit, 30/day and 300/month conversions free.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans support files up to 50GB.
